display.purpose: Product name and first-viewport homepage claims only.

headline.purpose: Major homepage sections and docs landing headings.

body.purpose: Readable public copy, setup instructions, and docs prose.

label.purpose: Navigation, attribution, small controls, and metadata.

app-sheet-blur.purpose: Bottom sheets, settings panels, and map overlays.

homepage-atmosphere.purpose: Panels over meaningful video or map imagery.

marker-shadow.purpose: Separating map route markers from map content.

states.default: Fern Green background, white text, 12px radius
Trail Yellow background, white text, 12px radius
White translucent fill, app-like blur, rounded sheet geometry
states.dark: White at 10% alpha over dark surfaces

states.default: Route lines, place markers, calendar states, bottom sheets, and screenshots drive homepage imagery

dos: Base homepage redesigns on the Flutter app's map, calendar, modal, and translucent-sheet language.
Use Fern Green #23AE54 as the public primary and App Fern Green #53C46C for app-led surfaces.
Show concrete product states instead of abstract SaaS claims.
Keep privacy and setup copy high contrast and direct.
donts: Do not make Fernwaerts feel like a crypto or web3 app.
Do not make the homepage look like a generic SaaS landing page.
Do not imply surveillance, growth analytics, enterprise monitoring, or investor-dashboard metrics.
Do not use gradient text, repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows, or identical icon-card grids as default homepage structure.
